Univariate Normal-Gamma (scale-mixture Student-t) component specification

Source: R/dist-normal-gamma.R
NormalGammaUvSpec-class.Rd

A conjugate scale-mixture representation of a univariate Student-t component: identical marginal to StudentTUvSpec, but with conjugate cluster updates because the kernel is Gaussian conditional on a latent per-observation precision multiplier. The degrees of freedom df are a fixed hyperparameter.

Slots

name

Fixed to "normal-gamma".

paramNames

c("mu", "s2").

References

Andrews, D.F., & Mallows, C.L. (1974). Scale mixtures of normal distributions. JRSS-B, 36(1), 99–102. doi:10.1111/j.2517-6161.1974.tb00989.x

West, M. (1987). On scale mixtures of normal distributions. Biometrika, 74(3), 646–648. doi:10.1093/biomet/74.3.646

Lange, K.L., Little, R.J.A., & Taylor, J.M.G. (1989). Robust statistical modeling using the t distribution. JASA, 84(408), 881–896. doi:10.1080/01621459.1989.10478852

See also

StudentTUvSpec for the direct (non-conjugate) path to the same marginal.
